title: 4級 模擬テスト4 リスニング第1部 (Miami) 1
prompt: 対話を聞き、その最後の発言に対する応答として最も適切なものを一つ選びなさい。
audioText:
A: Have you had the chance to visit the part-time jobs in Miami, Lisa?
B: Yes, although there were many people there.
A: I see. Would you recommend it to others?
choices: テーマから外れた無関係な解答
文法やスペルミスが多数ある解答

title: 4級 模擬テスト4 語句整序 1
prompt:
日本文の意味に合うように語句を並べ替えたとき、最も自然な文を選びなさい。

彼女は2006年からpart-time jobsのために毎日一生懸命働いています。
She ( 1. working / 2. for / 3. is / 4. hard ) the part-time jobs since 2006.
[Mock 4-1]
explanation: grade4-04-ordering-01: 語句整序の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 4級 模擬テスト4 読解 1
prompt: 会話を聞き、最後の発言への適切な応答を選択してください。
passage: Recently, part-time jobs has become very popular in London. Since 2006, many residents gather on weekends. Nancy, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 317 more events related to part-time jobs.
explanation: grade4-04-reading-01: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

explanation: grade4-04-reading-07: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

passage: Recently, historical monuments has become very popular in Toronto. Since 2013, many residents gather on weekends. Eve, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 366 more events related to historical monuments.
explanation: grade4-04-reading-08: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。
